subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto God! The peoples of the world are, in this day, witnessed to be deprived of both testimony and understanding. The Call [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الله اهل عالم امروز از گواهی و آگاهی هردو محروم مشاهده میشوند ندای
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection, opposition and persecution
